# Obsidian Integration

This directory marks the repository as Obsidian-ready without requiring a specific plugin setup.

## Recommended Plugins

- Templates or Templater
- Dataview
- Calendar
- Periodic Notes
- Tasks

## Recommended Usage

- Store reusable templates in `templates/`.
- Store active notes in `vault/`.
- Use links between opportunities, decisions, forecasts, sources, and execution plans.
- Use frontmatter consistently so dashboards can be built later.

## Dashboard Ideas

- Active decisions by review date
- Open opportunities by confidence score
- Forecasts awaiting resolution
- Execution plans by KPI status
- Source notes by market category
